## Process Agent Shortcuts (AI-DWG Generated)

The following shortcut invokes the AI-DWG governance agent. Type the shortcut anywhere in a chat prompt — the corresponding agent activates immediately. No further clarification needed.

**How it works:** The shortcut is a direct command. When the AI sees it in your prompt, it loads the corresponding agent from `.kiro/agents/` and executes its full check pass.

### Active Shortcuts

| Shortcut | Agent | When to Call | Tier |
|----------|-------|-------------|:----:|
| `WIA__` | `workspace-integrity-agent` — Workspace Integrity Audit | After workspace generation/reconciliation, before AI-GCE derivation | 1 |

### Shortcut Rules

1. **`WIA__` triggers Workspace Integrity Audit.** When the user types `WIA__` anywhere in a prompt, invoke `.kiro/agents/workspace-integrity-agent.md` and execute its full check pass. No clarification needed — treat `WIA__` as a direct command to run the agent.

### When to Call

Call `WIA__` at these process milestones:

| Milestone | Why |
|-----------|-----|
| After Mode 1 (Full Generation) | Validates the complete workspace before AI-GCE derives hooks |
| After Mode 2 (Delta Reconciliation) | Confirms architecture changes were correctly applied |
| After Mode 3 (Brownfield Overlay) | Verifies steering was merged without conflicts |
| Before AI-GCE governance derivation | Ensures steering files are complete for hook generation |
| Before development kickoff | Confirms day-1 readiness for the team |

### What Happens If You Don't Call It

The workspace may contain:
- Missing steering files (AI-GCE derives incomplete governance)
- Folder structure misaligned with architecture (developers build in wrong locations)
- Config inconsistencies (tooling doesn't match architecture decisions)
- Broken provenance (rules untraceable to architecture — trust erodes)

AI-GCE's compliance audit will eventually surface some of these gaps, but by then hooks may already be derived from incomplete steering — requiring re-derivation.

### Quick Guide

For full documentation on the workspace integrity checks, what happens if you skip, and how to recover, see:

> **`.governance/AGENT-GUIDE.md`** — the combined process agent user manual (AI-DWG section).
